title: 🤑 How to Apply for PM Mudra Loan Online in 2026 📈: A Step-by-Step Guide 🏦
metaTitle: PM Mudra Loan Online Application 2026 | Mudra Loan Apply Online
metaDescription: Learn how to apply for PM Mudra Loan online in 2026. Get step-by-step guidance on the online application process, eligibility criteria, and required documents.
tableOfContents: Eligibility Criteria for PM Mudra Loan
Required Documents for PM Mudra Loan
intro: Are you a small business owner or entrepreneur looking for financial assistance to grow your business? 🤔 The PM Mudra Loan scheme, launched by the Government of India, provides loans up to ₹10 lakhs to non-corporate, non-farm sector income-generating activities. 🤑 In this article, we will guide you through the process of applying for a PM Mudra Loan online in 2026. 📈

sections.heading: 📊 Introduction to PM Mudra Loan
sections.content: The PM Mudra Loan scheme is divided into three categories: Shishu, Kishor, and Tarun. 📈 The loan amounts for these categories are: Shishu (up to ₹50,000), Kishor (₹50,001 to ₹5 lakhs), and Tarun (₹5 lakhs to ₹10 lakhs). 🤑 The interest rates for PM Mudra Loans vary between 8.5% to 12.5% per annum, depending on the lender and loan amount. 📊

sections.heading: 📝 Eligibility Criteria for PM Mudra Loan
sections.content: To be eligible for a PM Mudra Loan, you must meet the following criteria: ✅ You should be a citizen of India. ✅ You should be above 18 years of age. ✅ Your business should be a non-corporate, non-farm sector income-generating activity. ✅ You should have a good credit score. 📊

sections.heading: 📁 Required Documents for PM Mudra Loan
sections.content: The required documents for a PM Mudra Loan vary depending on the lender and loan amount. 📊 However, the common documents required are: ✅ Identity proof (Aadhaar card, PAN card, etc.). ✅ Address proof (passport, driving license, etc.). ✅ Business proof (business registration certificate, etc.). ✅ Income proof (bank statement, etc.). 📊

sections.heading: 📈 Step-by-Step Online Application Process
sections.content: To apply for a PM Mudra Loan online, follow these steps: 📊 Step 1: Visit the official website of the lender or the PM Mudra Loan portal. 📊 Step 2: Fill in the online application form with your personal and business details. 📊 Step 3: Upload the required documents. 📊 Step 4: Submit the application form and wait for the lender's response. 📊

faqs.q: What is the maximum loan amount that can be availed under the PM Mudra Loan scheme?
faqs.a: The maximum loan amount that can be availed under the PM Mudra Loan scheme is ₹10 lakhs.

faqs.q: What are the interest rates for PM Mudra Loans?
faqs.a: The interest rates for PM Mudra Loans vary between 8.5% to 12.5% per annum, depending on the lender and loan amount.
